title: Compose detail: handle discovered-only stacks (no compose.yml on disk)

verification.vitest: 82/82 (80 baseline + 2 new — CS-6 readComposeFile + CS-7 validate)
verification.build: pass (main bundle gzip 104.41 → 104.67 kB; compose-detail chunk 34.05 → 34.20 kB)
verification.liveSmoke: verified 2026-05-17: 409 COMPOSE_FILE_UNAVAILABLE for /file + /validate on plane-app; UI banner + read-only editor + hidden Save/驗證 + visible Up/Down/Restart/Pull all confirmed

in: Frontend: mark Compose detail editor + Save + 驗證 read-only/disabled when stack.source === 'discovered' or stack.path is empty
Backend: return a clearer 4xx (e.g. CONFLICT / 'no compose file for discovered stack') instead of leaking ENOENT with internal path
out: Reconstructing a synthesised compose.yml from docker inspect
Auto-importing a discovered stack into a managed compose directory

decisions: Action buttons stay enabled (decisions.md §4 — they use the docker engine, no file required).
Single error code COMPOSE_FILE_UNAVAILABLE (409) for both empty path + missing file (decisions.md §2-3).
No automated e2e — backend unit tests + manual smoke only (decisions.md §5).
